entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Shaman Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: : Rank 1 to quickly and cheaply activate and , Rank 7 for an efficient single-target heal, and Rank 12 for a big single-target heal, usually used with stop-casting macros or .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Shaman Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: : Rank 1 for mana-efficient group healing, Rank 3 for a balance between mana and throughput, and Rank 5 for maximum throughput or emergency area-of-effect healing.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Shaman Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: : Rank 7 for emergency healing, and you can consider using Rank 5 to top people off if you are not using Healing Wave much.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Shaman Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Earth Shock : Rank 1 for mana-efficient interrupting.

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Shaman Healer in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Shaman Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Try to group your spell casts together. The "5 second" rule determines that your mana can only naturally regenerate when you have not cast anything for 5 seconds, which means that you can get a significant amount of mana back from casting your heals all in one go when your targets are low health, rather than keeping them topped with a new heal every time they take damage.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Shaman Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Make sure to train Ghost Wolf as soon as you hit Level 20, as it will make your leveling much faster before you get a proper mount at Level 30. This is especially relevant when not dungeon leveling.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Shaman Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Remember that much of your group clearing speed will come from having good uptime on buff totems, which should also be in range of the party members who can benefit from them. Your damage is very weak and mana inefficient, so focus on keeping allies healthy and totems down whenever you will be staying at a place for a while.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Shaman Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: While they do not give any end-game power, gathering professions such as Herbalism and Skinning are great while leveling, as you can level them up as you move from zone to zone and get some free gold by selling the gathered materials!

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Restoration Shaman Healer in TBC Classic
